creator: fjachuf@gmail.com
text:
Returning to this port again, months have passed and I have not received any response from the authors, but they have published a page explaining the permissions of the license and the only thing that is not allowed is to sell a modified version of surrealdb, but yes which can be used for commercial apps from what I understand

I am attaching the page so you can see if I am right or I may be missing something:
https://surrealdb.com/license

If everything is fine, should the license permissions of the Makefile be normal or should no-auto-accept be set?
